title: Constitution of Sub-Committee for framing the draft Rules/Regulations under Section 54 of Dam Safety Act, 2021
description: Constitution of Sub-Committee for framing the draft Rules/Regulations under Section 54 of Dam Safety Act, 2021
text: Government of India Ministry of Jal Shakti Dept. of Water Resources, RD&GR Central Water Commission Dam Safety Design-ll Directorate dated 12-5-22 No. CWC/DSD-1/1-4/2022/62-13 OFFICE MEMORANDUM Sub: Constitution of Sub-Committee for framing the draft Rules/Regulations under Section 54 of Dam Safety Act, 2021 -reg. am directed to convey the approval of competent authority for constitution of a Sub-Committeefor framing the draft Rules/Regulations as specified under Section 54 of Dam Safety Act, 2021. The composition of the Sub-Committee is as follows: Chairman Sh Gulshan Raj, Chief Engineer (Dso), CWC & Member (Policy & Research), NDSA Sh Vivek Tripathi, Director CMDD (E&NE), CWC Sh NN Rai, Director Hydrology (South), CWC 1 Member 2 Member 3 Member Sh. S S Bakshi, Director (DSM), CWC Sh Pramod Narayan, Director (DSR), CWC 4 Member Member Sh Shiv Kumar Sharma, Director BCD (N&VW), CWC Sh Samir Kumar Shukla, Director (FE&SA), CWC Sh Rahul Kumar Singh, Director Gates (NW&s), CWC Sh Manoj, Kumar, SJC (PR Wing), DoWR, RD&GR 10 Sh O P Gupta, Director (Instrumentation), CWC 6. Member Member8 Member 9 Member- Secretary Terms of Reference: To frame draft Rules/regulations as specified under Section 54 of Dam Safety Act 2021 and submission within 60 days from the date of issue of this OM. OP Gupta) 12 Ds22 Director, DSD-II Dte To: 1 Sh Gulshan Raj, Chief Engineer (DS0), CWC& Member (Policy & Research), NDSA Sh Vivek Tripathi, Director, CMDD (E&NE), CWNC 2 3. Sh NN Rai, Director, Hydrology (South), CWC Sh Pramod Narayan, Director (DSR), CWC . Sh. S S Bakshi, Director (DSM), CWC 5. Sh Shiv Kumar Sharma, Director BCD (N&W), CWC 6. 7 Sh Samir Kumar Shukla, Director (FE&SA), CWC Sh Rahul Kumar Singh, Director Gates (NW&S), CWC Sh Manoj, Kumar, SIC (PR Wing), DoWR, RD&GR 10 Sh O P Gupta, Director (Instrumentation), CWC 8 9 Copy for kind information to: 1. PPS to Secretary, DoWR, RD & GR 2. PPS to Chairman, Central Water Commission and Chairman, NCDS 3. PPS to Member (D&R), CWC and Chairman, NDSA 4. PPS to Joint Secretary (RD & PP), DoWR, RD&GR 5.
